headline: Texas Instruments Surges 18% as Data Center Demand Spikes 90%
summary: Texas Instruments is critical to data center construction and operation and is well-positioned to benefit from the boom.

headline: ON Semiconductor (ON) Gets Double-Digit PT Hike, Hits 2-Year High
summary: ON Semiconductor Corp. (NASDAQ:ON) is one of the 10 Stocks Posting Outsized Gains. ON Semiconductor climbed to an over two-year high on Thursday, extending a rally for 14 straight days, as investors resumed buying positions following an investment firm’s high double-digit price target upgrade, while loading portfolios ahead of its earnings outcome.
